name: what-next
description: What Next — AI-powered continuity engine. Your second brain that always knows what happened and what comes next.

scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs=require('fs'),os=require('os'),p='node_modules/onnxruntime-node/bin/napi-v3/'+os.platform()+'/'+os.arch()+'/onnxruntime_binding.node';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('FATAL: onnxruntime native binding missing at',p,'\nRun: npm install --force');process.exit(1);}console.log('OK: onnxruntime binding present (',p,')');"
